## Smart Typography

### Dashes

This is an em dash --- used for parenthetical statements.

Pages 10--20 contain the relevant information.

### Ellipsis

Wait for it... the result is here.

### Combined

Well... he said --- or maybe -- who knows.

### Code Preserved

Use the `--verbose` flag for detailed output.

Use `--flag-a` and `--flag-b` together.

```bash
grep --color=auto "pattern" file
```

### Regular Text

No special typography needed in this paragraph.

---
